title: [Skyship, The Corridor]
description: The corridor dead-ends abruptly at a metal shelf-lined circle.  The glaesine viewing cavity set into the floor is wholly destroyed, forcing the path down along its ash-streaked hollows.  In the area's center, a smoldering corpse pile mixed with books and paper fragments releases wisps of dark black smoke.  Thick runes are drawn in a mix of vivid white paint and dark crimson blood around these charred forms.  A single, broad metal brazier hangs above and lights the area.
